rumors.detail: Agent Mike Makaab confirmed interest from several European clubs following Under-20 World Cup performances. Agent stated: 'There will always be interest in young, talented players like Mfundo Vilakazi... particularly when they continue to perform well for a football club like Kaizer Chiefs'
Agent Mike Makaab believes Vilakazi's Under-20 World Cup performances could pave the way for a European move
Kaizer Chiefs were looking to trim down their big squad to make it more manageable. Vilakazi not specifically named for exit but mentioned in context of squad restructuring
